digest.title_en: @clickhouse/rowbinary: when your library is also a parser compiler
digest.title_pt: @clickhouse/rowbinary: when your library is also a parser compiler
digest.body_en:
I used to do the "proper" parser generation work some time ago and found out that a good enough generator has to make so many opinionated decisions that it starts to feel like writing a… small natural language translation level nuanced machine. Thus the attempt to use modern coding LLMs to please each and every picky user.

Tags: `databases`, `javascript`, `performance`, `vibecoding` · Author: **peter-leonov** Community buzz: **4** points, **1** comments, via **Lobsters**. Check the original source below for the full story.
digest.body_pt:
I used to do the "proper" parser generation work some time ago and found out that a good enough generator has to make so many opinionated decisions that it starts to feel like writing a… small natural language translation level nuanced machine. Thus the attempt to use modern coding LLMs to please each and every picky user.

Tags: `databases`, `javascript`, `performance`, `vibecoding` · Autor: **peter-leonov** Repercussão: **4** pontos, **1** comentários, via **Lobsters**. Confira a fonte original abaixo para a matéria completa.
